note: Chronological holdout backtest of equation.json (split never bisects a scan batch; held-out relist duplicates dropped, see n_test_relists). medale is median |log(actual)-log(pred)| (0.69 ~= off by 2x); skill is pinball-loss improvement over a constant baseline given the SAME trim/recency preprocessing (> 0 means the mods carry signal); frac_above should sit near 0.75 when the quantile target is calibrated. `segments` repeats the metrics restricted to test rows asking >= 5ex / >= 60ex (where mispricing actually costs money) and to rows whose listing later SOLD (gone while a higher ask stayed visible) -- the closest thing to clearing-price ground truth asks can give. `residuals` (per group and per segment) are weighted q25/q50/q75/q90 quantiles of the SIGNED holdout errors log(actual)-log(pred): exp(q50) is the measured multiplier from the floor prediction to the typical ask, exp(q90) to the high tail.
